data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether Google handles initial booking data capture, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation or checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented. The absence of evidence regarding the handling of booking data capture by Google indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that Google handles initial booking data capture.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
